print_working_directory.Description: Print the current working directory of the default writable workspace.

list_root.Description: List top-level entries in the default writable workspace.

list_relative_path.Description: List the contents of a relative path located inside the default writable workspace.

path.Description: Relative path to inspect inside the writable workspace.

create_directory.Description: Create a subdirectory inside the default writable workspace and return its resolved path.
create_directory.Script: $target = {{path}}; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $target -Force | Out-Null; Resolve-Path $target | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Path

path.Description: Relative directory path to create inside the writable workspace.

write_markdown_file.Description: Create or overwrite a Markdown file inside the default writable workspace. The content must be provided as UTF-8 base64.
write_markdown_file.Script: $target = {{path}}; $parent = Split-Path -Parent $target; if ($parent) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $parent -Force | Out-Null }; $content = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([System.Convert]::FromBase64String({{contentBase64}})); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($target, $content, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)); Write-Output $target

path.Description: Relative .md file path to create inside the writable workspace.

contentBase64.Description: Markdown content encoded as UTF-8 base64.

print_working_directory_sh.Description: Print the current working directory using /bin/sh if available on the machine.
